\tzpentry{ID4805}{Text Potential Energy Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4805 introduces Text Potential Energy Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{U}_{\\text{tri}} = \\exp\\left(-i \\frac{\\pi}{8} \\sigma_z^{(1)} \\otimes \\sigma_z^{(2)} \\otimes \\sigma_z^{(3)}\\right)\n\\end{equation}
